## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo build --workspace` — zero errors
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` — passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings` — zero warnings
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` — all tests pass
- [ ] If touching the IPC schema or sandbox policy schema in `linpodx-common`, all affected crates updated and migration noted
- [ ] If adding dependencies, `cargo audit` and `cargo deny check` clean
- [ ] Documentation updated (CHANGELOG, docs — both `en` and `ko` if user-visible)
- [ ] No hardcoded paths, credentials, or personal info
